item.title: About
item.description: I like Mandalorian and Grogu as well as Pokémon Plush. Aspring AI Engineer full-time job in U.S. ex SDE intern @Microsoft Ongoing OMSCS @Georgia Tech 2023 ~ 2026: MS Computer Science, Northeastern University (Boston) 2021 ~ 2023: Associate Attorney, Global Law Office (Shanghai) 2017 ~ 2021: LLB, Shanghai Jiao Tong University Contact: eugieyan@gmail.com
